value: Beads UI should expose issue list, board, epic tree, memory, formulas, molecules, gates, profiles, and runnable agent instances.
Agents should call bd ready, claim work, update status, comment progress, and close with evidence.
OpenWork wraps bd instead of rewriting Dolt-backed Beads semantics.
